title: Discussing a Project 讨论项目
scene: 两位同事讨论新项目方案

lines.en: Have you read the new project brief?
lines.zh: 你看过新的项目简报了吗？

lines.en: Yes, but I think the deadline is too tight.
lines.zh: 看了，但我觉得截止日期太紧了。

lines.en: I agree. We need at least two more weeks.
lines.zh: 我同意。我们至少还需要两周。

lines.en: Should we talk to the project manager about it?
lines.zh: 我们应该和项目经理谈谈吗？

lines.en: Definitely. Also, who do you think should lead the team?
lines.zh: 当然。另外，你觉得谁应该带领团队？

lines.en: Maybe David? He has the most experience.
Good idea. Let us prepare a proposal together.
lines.zh: 好主意。我们一起准备一份提案吧。

lines.en: Sure. When should we present it?
lines.zh: 好的。我们什么时候展示？
